name: Before / After Usage
description: Использование товара: до и после ожидаемого результата. Натурально, журнальная реклама. Без инфографики.
prompt_prefix: Magazine advertisement photography showing the product being used and its expected result. Natural scene. Not infographic, not split-screen — show the moment of transformation or the result context naturally. Realistic. Premium commercial quality. Ultra realistic. 8K.
composition: Product visible in scene, result visible contextually, natural narrative framing
lighting: Natural warm light, consistent across the scene
